title: Xaero的地图汉化包 Xaero's World Map Chinese Localization Package
description: A datapack can translate you Xaero's World Map mod to Chinese
body:
![LoongLy Software](https://gitee.com/zixuan_long/Img/raw/master/LS3.png)

# 中文
支持1.21.X的Xaero mod  
同时支持Fabirc Forge Neoforge  
将汉化包作为材质包安装即可完成汉化  
# English
Supports Xaero mod 1.21.X  
Simultaneously supporting Fabirc Forge Neoforge  
Install the localization package as a material package to complete the localization process  
![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba0716b3f53592c3612dd7cee485b312a0b130bb.jpeg)
